name: Lagos
key_planning_challenge: Rapid growth, lagoon geography, flooding, and infrastructure gaps require staged serviced expansion and transit-first corridors.
expansion_constraint: Lagoon and wetland systems, flood-prone coast, informal settlement pressure

historical_snapshots.key_event: Port city grows as administrative and commercial hub
Metropolitan expansion pushes north and west
BRT and megacity planning become central
Coastal resilience and infrastructure delivery dominate planning
